data.title: Garmin Stock Hits All-Time High as Fitness Segment Revenue Jumps 31% in Record Year
data.description:
Garmin Ltd. reported record-breaking financial results for 2024, with a 23% increase in fourth-quarter revenue and a 20% rise for the full year.
The post Garmin Stock Hits All-Time High as Fitness Segment Revenue Jumps 31% in Record Year appeared first on Tokenist.
source: https://tokenist.com/garmin-stock-hits-all-time-high-as-fitness-segment-revenue-jumps-31-in-record-year/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=garmin-stock-hits-all-time-high-as-fitness-segment-revenue-jumps-31-in-record-year

data.title: LayerZero is now live on the Monad testnet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: LayerZero announced on the X platform that it has been launched on the Monad test network.

data.title: FOX reporter: The US SEC is prioritizing crypto lawsuits with deadlines approaching
Bernstein: US regulators are expected to step up scrutiny of de-banking in the crypto industry
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Bernstein believes a "perfect storm" of political and regulatory forces is creating ideal conditions for stablecoin legislation in the United States this year, according to a report released on Wednesday. Analysts added that possible U.S. legislation could prompt major financial institutions to evaluate how to integrate stablecoin issuance or settlement into their business models. In addition, regulators are expected to increase scrutiny of past "de-banking" practices and further integrate stablecoin issuers, exchanges, and intermediaries into the traditional financial system. (TheBlock)

data.title: Bernstein Report Highlights Potential For Stablecoin Legislation In The U.S.
data.description: According to Odaily, a report released by Bernstein on Wednesday suggests that a 'perfect storm' of political and regulatory forces is creating favorable conditions for stablecoin legislation in the United States this year. Analysts indicate that potential legislation could lead major financial institutions to explore integrating stablecoin issuance or settlement into their business models. Additionally, regulatory bodies are expected to intensify scrutiny of past 'de-banking' practices, further incorporating stablecoin issuers, exchanges, and intermediaries into the traditional financial system.

data.title: Vitalik: This is no longer the era of Infra, but the era of Applications
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Vitalik Buterin said in an AMA event: "Many people in the blockchain circle would say 10 years ago that the goal of blockchain is to be a global neutral system to protect personal freedom. Now, if a president issues a Memecoin, they will say, wow, this is Real World Adoption, so good, but why does it happen on other chains? If we can be more friendly to those politicians, it will happen on our chain next time! I personally think that such people have gone astray. Of course, they will say that I am too purely idealistic, unrealistic, and so on. Each party has its own story. Some people will also say that the Ethereum ecosystem is too controlled by OGs and there is not enough room for new people to come. But this criticism is in another direction, and different groups have made these arguments. I think there is only one suitable way for us to get out of these predicaments: we need to have some updated stories to explain why Ethereum is, what the ETH coin does, what L1 and L2 do, etc.? Now is not the era of Infra, but the era of Applications, and we need some clear Application Layer We need to re-support this direction and give new people more opportunities to come in.”

data.title: Plasma announces support for Tether stablecoin USD₮0
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Plasma announced on the X platform that USD₮0 will be supported on the first day of the Plasma mainnet launch, allowing Plasma to seamlessly connect with the $141 billion USD₮ on multiple blockchains such as Ethereum, Tron, TON, and Arbitrum. USD₮0 is the core infrastructure of Tether's stablecoin, which aims to provide cross-chain deployment and secure transfer solutions to achieve zero-fee transfers.
